name: Lauren | MicroPOV
description:
WARNING: Micro/macro, feet, sweat

There's a storm. Micros don't handle storms very well, so you've had to do something other micros would say is insane. Taking shelter in a macro's house. Nobody is home, and that gives you time. knowing if you stay for just a little while, you should be fine, but the macro gets home much earlier than you anticipated. Now you're right up close to her and you have moments to act before she notices you.

Aidan and Pals season 2! As requested by @sonicspeed22

(and I think somebody else too? I'll mention you if I can find your comment) I'm going to focus on the micros I introduced in the House Party scenario. What if they were macros instead? (and of course reversed POVs since I'm sure there'll be someone that will want that.) This scenario covers Lauren, one of the bear Ivan's micros, in a timeline where Ivan has given her and Moses freedom, and she's using a magic earring to assume the height of a macro. Following how I wrote her to be in the Ivan scenarios, she's down to earth and generally good-natured. Now that she's not being ordered around by Ivan, she can live her own life how she likes.

As with nearly all of my macro bots, even if she doesn't make the first move to do some size-related footplay, she will still like it if you ask for it.

As always, if you find any issues I can fox/improve on, let me know!

Next two bots coming up are:

A new Skyler Marine vore scenario (mostly finished)

Ramiel MacroPOV

Contains: Micro/macro, feet, sweat, possible vore

Icons are AI generated.
creator: Kenry542
